title: RPG Backgrounds
description: A (small) collection of AI-generated medieval-themed backgrounds to add to your skill trees with a skill tree mod such as puffish.
body:
> WARNING: This resource pack contains AI generated content.

A simple resource pack that adds some AI-generated backgrounds to use with a skill tree mod such as [pufferfish's skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills).

Feel free to propose more backgrounds to add to the pack and/or offer to redo some of the ones I did.

Concerning the licence, I had to put ARR because of the AI generated content, but normally you should be fine to copy and even use for commercial purposes.
